name: Adobe Flash End-of-Life
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can understand Adobe Flash end-of-life implications for "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}, {"text": " to ensure continued system functionality after Flash deprecation. This information helps prepare for technology transitions by identifying any Flash dependencies, implementing alternative solutions, and ensuring uninterrupted retail operations through browser and security updates."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Preparing for Flash end-of-life involves reviewing system components, implementing recommended updates, and verifying functionality with modern browser technologies. When properly prepared, you can expect seamless transition away from Flash dependencies, maintained system functionality, and improved security through updated technology standards."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h1", "children": [{"text": "Adobe Flash End-of-Life"}], "data-id": "adobe-flash-end-of-life"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Last updated:", "bold": true}, {"text": " 21-09-2020"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Adobe has announced support for Adobe Flash is coming to an end as at 31st of December 2020. Read on to see what impact this will have within Retail Express and what's changing."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "On this page"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1221-adobe-flash-end-of-life#impacts", "children": [{"text": "What are the impacts?"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1221-adobe-flash-end-of-life#to-do", "children": [{"text": "What do you need to do?"}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": "What are the impacts?", "bold": true}], "data-id": "what-are-the-impacts"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Adobe has announced they will stop distributing and updating Flash Player after 31st of December 2020. (Related: "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.adobe.com/au/products/flashplayer/end-of-life.html", "children": [{"text": "Adobe Flash EOL General Information Page"}]}, {"text": ")."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Retail Express uses Flash in two areas of the system - the Dashboard in Back Office, and the Zebra Label Presets. The Presets area is where you can design the layout of the labels printed using the Zebra Label Printers."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pmFEdEAM.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pmFEdEAM.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "Dashboard.jpg"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Back Office Dashboard", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pmGk0EAE.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pmGk0EAE.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "zebra.jpg"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Zebra Label Presets", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Feature Updates:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "As a result of the discontinuation of Flash, we will be updating both the Back Office Dashboards and Zebra Label Presets page."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Mobile Dashboards"}, {"text": "still remain fully available."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The same great functionality will be available in both areas, but with an updated look-and-feel."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": "What do you need to do?", "bold": true}], "data-id": "what-do-you-need-to-do"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "There's nothing you need to do - these features will be rolled out to your system automatically."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "We'll advise of the update via:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Release Notes"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Back Office sidebar"}]}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://ress.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/360000907875", "children": [{"text": "Click here"}]}, {"text": " to sign up for Release Notifications, and ensure you add "}, {"type": "a", "url": "mailto:support@retailexpress.com.au", "children": [{"text": "support@retailexpress.com.au "}]}, {"text": "to your safe senders list."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pmGkAEAU.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pmGkAEAU.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "inline", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip0 (7).png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": "Back Office sidebar", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you have any questions about the changes please contact"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://ress.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/requests/new", "children": [{"text": "the Support Team."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
